display.purpose: Hero headings only. Single-fold, one or two words, maximum visual mass.

label.purpose: Metadata only: prices, tags, form labels. Short strings. Always uppercase with wide tracking.

shadows.name: tonal-lift
shadows.purpose: Card and list item hover. No actual box-shadow; background step is the elevation signal.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: WhatsApp FAB pulse ring only. Keyframe animation, not a static shadow.

shadows.name: nav-blur
shadows.purpose: Nav bar on scroll. Signals the nav has elevated above page content.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: System easing. All transitions and animations. Expo-out character, springs into final position.

motion.name: page-transition
motion.purpose: Full-page overlay slides out after navigation.

motion.name: cursor-lag
motion.purpose: Ring cursor follow coefficient. 11% per frame creates ~200ms perceived lag.

motion.name: magnetic-pull
motion.value: translate(dx*0.3, dy*0.3) on mousemove; cleared on mouseleave with 0.5s ease-spring

motion.name: card-tilt
motion.purpose: Work cards and service cards on mousemove. 7° is the max tilt.

motion.name: hero-reveal
motion.value: translateY(110% → 0) per .ll child, staggered by nth-child delay
motion.purpose: Hero text lines, wrapped in overflow:hidden .lw containers.

motion.name: scroll-reveal
motion.value: opacity:0 + translateY(32px) → opacity:1 + translateY(0), 0.85s ease-spring, threshold 0.08
motion.purpose: IntersectionObserver adds .vis to .rv elements. Content is visible without the class; the animation enhances it.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.notes: Nav collapses to hamburger + mobile menu.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. White pill, gradient hover. Magnetic on desktop.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 32px; background: #fff; color: #080808; border: none; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #3b82f6 50%, #06b6d4 100%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary span, .ds-btn-primary svg { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-btn-primary:hover::before { opacity: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn-arrow { transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.6); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Navigation text link. Muted at rest, white + underline reveal on hover/active.
components.html: HomeWorkServicesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 40px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.42); text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: #fff; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #fff; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link--active::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.6); outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Dark input with purple focus glow. Used in contact form.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-input { background: #111; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-family: inherit; color: #fff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(139,92,246,0.6); background: rgba(139,92,246,0.04); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Work Card
components.description: Portfolio project card with hover overlay and 3D tilt.
components.html:
Landing Page

Retail Brand
components.css: .ds-work-card { position: relative; border-radius: 16px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); background: #111; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-work-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-work-thumb { aspect-ratio: 16/10; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-work-bg { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139,92,246,0.25) 0%, rgba(59,130,246,0.2) 100%); } .ds-work-hover { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; } .ds-work-card:hover .ds-work-hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-work-btn { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); color: #080808; border: none; border-radius: 100px; padding: 10px 22px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transform: translateY(12px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), opacity 0.3s; } .ds-work-card:hover .ds-work-btn { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } .ds-work-meta { padding: 20px; } .ds-work-cat { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-work-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #fff; }

components.name: Page Loader
components.description: Full-screen brand loader. Progress bar increments randomly, slides up on complete.
components.html:
PrismStatic.web
0
components.css: .ds-loader { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 9999; background: #080808; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-loader.hide { transform: translateY(-100%); } .ds-loader-brand { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin-bottom: 52px; color: #fff; } .ds-loader-brand span { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #3b82f6 50%, #06b6d4 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .ds-loader-bar { width: 220px; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.13); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-loader-fill { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6 0%, #3b82f6 50%, #06b6d4 100%); width: 0; transition: width 0.08s linear; } .ds-loader-pct { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.42); letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin-top: 14px; }

components.name: WhatsApp FAB
components.description: Fixed bottom-right WhatsApp contact button with pulse ring. Signal Green only.
components.css: .ds-wa-fab { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; right: 28px; z-index: 200; width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 50%; background: #22c55e; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); transition: transform 0.2s; animation: ds-wa-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-wa-fab:hover { transform: scale(1.1); animation: none; } @keyframes ds-wa-pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,197,94,0.45); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 14px rgba(34,197,94,0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,197,94,0); } }

narrative.overview:
PrismStatic.web is a dark room with precise instruments. Every surface is near-black, every action is deliberate, every animation is controlled. The site doesn't pitch—it demonstrates. A prospect arrives skeptical and leaves convinced, not because of what was said, but because of what was built.

The palette is almost achromatic. Three surface steps (Forge Black → Carbon → Ash) give depth without decoration. A single tri-color gradient arc—violet through blue to cyan—is the only saturated presence; it appears where it earns attention and nowhere else. Motion is expo-out: springs snap into position, page transitions slide like heavy panels, and the custom cursor lags behind the pointer with a measured 11% follow coefficient that reads as physical weight.

This system explicitly rejects the AI-agency aesthetic: cream backgrounds, eyebrow labels above every section, gradient text in headings, 01/02/03 section markers, identical icon-card grids, hero stat blocks.
keyCharacteristics: One gradient arc (violet → blue → cyan), used as highlight only
Single typeface (Inter), extreme weight contrast (900 display vs 400 body)
Cursor-driven interactivity: magnetic CTAs, lagging ring cursor, card tilt
Expo-out easing throughout; no bounce, no elastic
SVG icons only, no emoji anywhere

rules.name: The One Arc Rule
rules.body: The violet-blue-cyan gradient is the only saturated presence. It may appear as a loader fill, button hover, progress bar, or single-word highlight. Never as a decorative stripe, card background, or page-section fill. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Forge Rule
rules.body: Surfaces layer in three steps: #080808 → #111 → #181818. Never lighter than Ash Surface for an elevated component. Never a fourth layer.

rules.name: The Compression Rule
rules.body: Display headings use line-height 0.95 and letter-spacing -0.045em at weight 900. These are the floor; go tighter and letters touch. Go looser and the mass dissolves. Don't adjust.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through weight and size only. Never through color — don't make a heading purple or a subheading dimmed-white to create hierarchy.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on resting-state cards, panels, or any component. The surface system handles depth. Shadows are reserved for the pulse animation and nav blur only.

dos: Use the brand gradient as a button hover fill, loader bar, or single emphasis word only
Use surface layering (#080808 → #111 → #181818) to create depth
Compress display headings: weight 900, line-height 0.95, letter-spacing -0.045em
Apply magnetic push behavior exclusively to primary CTAs
Wrap reveal-animated headings in overflow:hidden containers so content is always present in the DOM
Include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) that skips motion but preserves final state
Use SVG icons at 18–24px, stroke-width 1.5, round caps/joins
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) except for the logo and one hero emphasis word
Don't put small-caps tracked labels above every section heading
Don't use numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) as decorative dividers
Don't build identical icon + heading + text card grids
Don't use hero stat blocks (big number, small label, supporting stats)
Don't use a warm-neutral or cream background — the page is #080808
Don't use box-shadow on resting-state cards or panels
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe
Don't use elastic or bounce easing — expo-out only
Don't add a fourth surface level lighter than #181818
